intro.title: World's Leading Innovation OS
intro.body: ITONICS provides innovation management solutions to a global customer base of more than 500 organizations. In Gartner's 2024 Hype Cycle for Innovation Practices, the company was recognized across four innovation-related categories. Supported by a worldwide team of over 150 professionals, ITONICS works with major international companies, including Amazon, adidas, Johnson & Johnson, Toyota, Mondelez International, and Siemens.

stats.label: Trusted by users across the globe.

cards.title: INSIGHT
cards.description: ITONICS analyzes news, research publications, and patent data to uncover timely insights across markets, topics, and regions.

cards.title: Sites
cards.description: Create forms, launch campaigns, or build complete HTML websites directly within ITONICS.

cards.title: Roadmap
cards.description: Plan innovation strategies and track project tasks over time with the ITONICS Roadmap.

cards.title: Reports
cards.description: Monitor key characteristics and KPIs through Reports, Dashboards, and Tables, enabling focused and productive leadership discussions.

cards.title: Processes
cards.description: Create structured, step-by-step workflows for ideas, startups, projects, and other element types. Guide users through defined phases and approvals while strengthening governance and transparency.
